sp_widget.name: My Group Incidents
sp_widget.description: Displays incidents assigned to the current user's support groups. L1 agents see their group's incidents with state update and escalation capabilities.
sp_widget.template:
My Group's Incidents

View and manage incidents assigned to your support groups

{{c.data.summary.total}}
Total Incidents
{{c.data.summary.new_count}}
New
{{c.data.summary.in_progress_count}}
In Progress
{{c.data.summary.on_hold_count}}
On Hold

Loading incidents...

{{c.errorMessage}}
No Incidents Found

There are currently no incidents assigned to your groups.

{{incident.number}} {{incident.state_label}}

Created: {{incident.created_date}}

{{incident.short_description}}

{{incident.category}} / {{incident.subcategory}} | {{incident.caller_name}}

View
